instructions.name: cancel_deal
docs: Cancels a deal and refunds any locked funds.
Authorization rules:
- `Created` status: any participant (buyer, seller, middleman) can cancel.
- `CollateralLocked` status: only the middleman can cancel (arbiter role).
- `PaymentLocked` / terminal states: cancellation is not allowed.

instructions.name: close_deal
docs: Closes a terminal deal account and reclaims rent to the specified receiver.
Only callable by buyer, seller, or middleman after deal is Completed, Refunded, or Cancelled.
Note: This is NOT paused — participants must always be able to reclaim rent.

accounts.name: deal
docs: The deal PDA — closed and rent reclaimed

accounts.name: authority
docs: Only the buyer, seller, or middleman can close a finished deal

instructions.name: confirm_deposit
docs: Confirms that a plain SOL deposit has arrived at the deal PDA.
ONLY the middleman can call this. The workflow is:
1. Middleman creates deal → gives PDA address to buyer/seller
2. Buyer/seller send plain SOL transfers to the PDA address
3. Middleman watches PDA balance on-chain
4. When deposit detected, middleman calls confirm_deposit
5. Contract verifies PDA balance covers the expected amount
6. Flags are updated and deal state advances
This eliminates the need for buyer/seller to call Anchor instructions.

instructions.name: create_deal
docs: Creates a new escrow deal. Only the buyer or the middleman agent may call this.

accounts.name: deal
docs: The deal PDA — unique per (buyer, deal_id)

accounts.name: initializer
docs: Must be the buyer or the middleman agent

accounts.name: config
docs: Global config — checked for pause status

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Initializes the global config. Can only be called once.

instructions.name: initialize_governance_config
docs: Initializes Phase 4C governance roles without reallocating Config.

instructions.name: lock_collateral
docs: Locks collateral for the calling party (buyer or seller).
Both parties must lock before the deal advances to `CollateralLocked`.

instructions.name: lock_payment
docs: Locks the agreed price as payment from the buyer.
Requires both collaterals to already be locked.

instructions.name: refund_on_timeout
docs: Refunds all locked funds if the deal has timed out.
Only a deal participant (buyer, seller, or middleman) can trigger this.
The deal must NOT be in a terminal state.

instructions.name: release_funds
docs: Releases escrowed funds to the seller and refunds collateral to the buyer.
Only the middleman agent can authorize this. A fee is deducted.
Funds are moved via direct lamport manipulation (not system_program CPI)
because the PDA is not a signer for outbound transfers. The account is
closed separately via `close_deal` to reclaim rent.

instructions.name: reveal_and_verify_terms
docs: Reveals and verifies the terms of a privacy-mode deal.
The caller provides the original plaintext terms (price, collateral amounts,
asset type) plus the cryptographic nonce used during commitment. The contract
recomputes SHA-256(canonical_payload) and compares it against the stored
`terms_hash`. This proves the revealed terms match what was committed
without ever having stored plaintext on-chain.
Security:
- Only callable after deal reaches `Completed` status (settlement done)
- Prevents double-reveal via `terms_revealed` flag
- Only deal participants (buyer, seller, middleman) can call

instructions.name: set_governance_authorities
docs: Updates Phase 4C governance roles. The current Config authority or the
configured Protocol Admin authority may rotate these roles.

instructions.name: set_paused
docs: Toggles the paused state. Only the config authority can call this.

instructions.name: set_paused_governed
docs: Bounded pause controlled by Phase 4C governance. Emergency Pause may
pause immediately; unpause is delayed unless Protocol Admin approves.

instructions.name: transfer_config_authority
docs: Transfers legacy Config authority to a governed authority such as a
Squads Protocol Admin vault.

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount: must be greater than zero

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized for this operation

errors.name: InvalidState
errors.msg: Invalid deal status for this operation

errors.name: AlreadyDeposited
errors.msg: Funds have already been deposited for this party

errors.name: CollateralNotLocked
errors.msg: Collateral has not been fully locked by both parties

errors.name: PaymentNotLocked
errors.msg: Payment has not been locked yet

errors.name: TimeoutNotReached
errors.msg: Timeout has not been reached yet

errors.name: DealAlreadyCompleted
errors.msg: Deal is already completed

errors.name: DealAlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Deal is already refunded

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow or underflow

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: Insufficient lamports in escrow for this disbursement

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: String input exceeds maximum allowed length

errors.name: InvalidTimeout
errors.msg: Timeout must be in the future

errors.name: DealNotTerminal
errors.msg: Deal is not in a terminal state; cannot close

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Contract is paused by admin

errors.name: DealAlreadyCancelled
errors.msg: Deal has already been cancelled

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Mint mismatch between deal and provided account

errors.name: TermsHashRequired
errors.msg: Terms hash is required for Privacy mode deals

errors.name: TermsHashMismatch
errors.msg: Terms hash mismatch during reveal

errors.name: TermsAlreadyRevealed
errors.msg: Terms already revealed — double reveal prevented

errors.name: DealNotCompleted
errors.msg: Deal must be completed before revealing terms

errors.name: DefaultAuthority
errors.msg: Authority cannot be the default public key

errors.name: UnpauseDelayActive
errors.msg: Unpause delay has not elapsed

types.name: Config
docs: Global config PDA — stores admin authority and paused flag.

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin authority who can pause/unpause + transfer authority

fields.name: paused
docs: If true, all deal-mutating instructions are blocked

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: deal_id
docs: Unique identifier for this deal

fields.name: buyer
docs: Buyer's wallet pubkey

fields.name: seller
docs: Seller's wallet pubkey

fields.name: middleman
docs: AI middleman agent pubkey

fields.name: trade_mode
docs: Trading mode (Normal or Privacy/ZK)

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint this deal is denominated in

fields.name: decimals
docs: The decimals of the token mint (for off-chain calculation)

fields.name: asset_type
docs: Short asset type label (e.g., "SOL", "USDC")

fields.name: asset_description
docs: Longer description of the asset or terms

fields.name: price
docs: Agreed price in lamports/tokens

fields.name: collateral_buyer
docs: Buyer's required collateral

fields.name: collateral_seller
docs: Seller's required collateral

fields.name: buyer_collateral_locked
docs: Whether the buyer has locked their collateral

fields.name: seller_collateral_locked
docs: Whether the seller has locked their collateral

fields.name: payment_locked
docs: Whether the buyer has locked the payment

fields.name: status
docs: Current deal lifecycle status

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when deal was created

fields.name: timeout
docs: Unix timestamp after which timeout refund is allowed

fields.name: middleman_fee_bps
docs: Fee in basis points (100 = 1%)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: terms_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of the agreed terms (price, collateral, asset, nonce).
Only populated when trade_mode == Privacy. Zero-filled for Normal mode.

fields.name: terms_revealed
docs: Whether the terms have been revealed and verified post-settlement.

types.name: DepositType
docs: Deposit type for the confirm_deposit instruction.
The middleman specifies which deposit is being confirmed.

types.name: GovernanceConfig
docs: Phase 4C governance roles. This PDA is separate from Config so existing
devnet Config accounts can migrate without reallocating account data.

fields.name: protocol_admin_authority
docs: Squads Protocol Admin vault: upgrades/config/treasury/cap authority.

fields.name: pause_authority
docs: Squads Emergency Pause vault: bounded pause authority only.

fields.name: treasury_authority
docs: Fee treasury authority/vault.

fields.name: last_paused_at
docs: Timestamp of the latest governed pause.

fields.name: unpause_delay_seconds
docs: Minimum delay before pause authority can unpause.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
